subject: Gaming
title: The Future of RPGs
description: Learn The Future of RPGs in one minute.

hook.text: AI could generate infinite quests, unique dialogue, and personalized storylines. RPGs may change forever.

buildup.text: Modern RPGs already feature hundreds of hours of content. AI could make that limitless.

discovery.text: Procedural generation combined with AI storytelling could create worlds that adapt to each player.

twist.text: But handcrafted stories still outperform generated ones. The Witcher 3 proves human writing matters.

climax.text: The future RPG will likely blend AI generation with human curation—infinite worlds with curated souls.

punchline.text: AI can generate worlds. Humans still write the best stories.

quiz.question: How might AI change RPGs in the future?
options: By generating infinite quests and personalized storylines
